title: bee_state.mjs worker prune — auto-clean .bee/workers dispatch transients
action: Add a 'prune' sub-verb to the existing worker command switch in templates/bee_state.mjs (per decision bb4bb18e: thin-CLI verbs own every .bee mutation). Prunable = file directly in .bee/workers/ whose name matches the transient suffix set \.(prompt\.md|result\.md|result\.json|out\d*\.log|log)$ AND whose stem is not any state.workers[].cell AND whose cell file .bee/cells/<stem>.json, when present, has status 'capped'. Support --dry-run (list only) and --json. Read state via readStateStrict (corrupt state = fail loud, zero deletions); never write state.json from prune; missing .bee/workers dir = success with 0 pruned. Update the usage comment and the unknown-action Use: line. Add process-level checks to test_lib.mjs mirroring the runBeeState harness. Add one wrap-up line to bee-swarming's reference: after the final slice caps and review completes, the orchestrator runs worker prune. Then re-vendor .bee/bin/bee_state.mjs byte-identically.

truths: A capped-cell transient is deleted; open/claimed-cell and active-worker transients are kept
A file not matching the transient suffix set is never touched (mtg-settings-pre.json class)
Corrupt state.json exits non-zero and deletes nothing
--dry-run deletes nothing and reports the same candidate set
templates/bee_state.mjs stays byte-identical to .bee/bin/bee_state.mjs (standing sweep green)

artifacts.substantive: worker prune verb with suffix + keep rules, dry-run, strict state read
process-level prune checks per plan.md test matrix
wrap-up line: orchestrator runs worker prune at feature close

key_links: .out2.log/.out3.log stems map to the same cell id as .out.log
Use: line for unknown worker action lists prune
prohibitions: Do not write state.json from the prune path
Do not delete anything outside .bee/workers/ or recurse into subdirectories
Do not weaken existing assertions in test_lib.mjs

trace.outcome: Added worker prune verb to bee_state.mjs: deletes .bee/workers transients matching the suffix set (.prompt.md/.result.md/.result.json/.out*.log/.log) whose stem is no active worker's cell and whose cell (when present) is capped; --dry-run and --json supported; readStateStrict before any rm; state.json never written. parseArgs taught --dry-run is boolean (it was swallowing the next flag). 4 process-level checks added; swarming reference gained the Transient hygiene wrap-up rule. Vendored byte-identically; live prune cleared 64 files (2.8M -> 12K).
